name: AI Data Platform
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq docker.io && mkdir -p ~/.docker/cli-plugins && curl -fsSL https://github.com/docker/compose/releases/download/v2.24.5/docker-compose-linux-x86_64 -o ~/.docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose && chmod +x ~/.docker/cli-plugins/docker-compose && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock && cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true && pip install --quiet numpy pandas faker cryptography dbt-duckdb==1.7.4 great-expectations==0.18.19
